params.name: q
params.description: Search query string (genome name, accession, or keyword).

params.name: browser
params.description: Filter by browser name.

params.name: year
params.description: Filter assemblies by year.

params.description: Filter by category.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by assembly status.

params.name: level
params.description: Filter by assembly level.

params.name: statsOnly
params.description: Return only statistics if set to 1.

params.name: maxItemsOutput
params.description: Maximum number of items to return.

items.docs: Search for genomes by name, accession number, or keywords across NCBI and UCSC assemblies.

params.name: maxItemsOutput
params.description: Maximum number of files to return.

params.description: Genome assembly identifier (e.g., hg38, mm39).

params.description: URL of the hub.txt file for a track hub.

params.name: trackLeavesOnly
params.description: Set to 1 to return only leaf tracks (hide composite containers).

items.docs: Returns the schema and field definitions for a specific annotation track.

params.name: genome
params.description: Genome assembly identifier (e.g., hg38, mm39).

params.name: track
params.description: Track name to retrieve data from.

params.name: chrom
params.description: Chromosome to retrieve data for.

params.name: start
params.description: Start position (0-based).

params.name: end
params.description: End position (1-based).

params.name: hubUrl
params.description: URL of the hub.txt file for a track hub.

params.name: maxItemsOutput
params.description: Maximum number of annotation items to return.

params.name: jsonOutputArrays
params.description: Set to 1 to format output as JSON arrays instead of objects.

items.docs: Retrieves annotation data from a specific track for a genomic region.

params.name: genome
params.description: Genome assembly identifier (e.g., hg38, mm39).

params.name: chrom
params.description: Chromosome identifier (e.g., chr1, chrM).

params.name: start
params.description: Start position (0-based, half-open coordinates).

params.name: end
params.description: End position (1-based, half-open coordinates).

params.name: revComp
params.description: Set to 1 to return the reverse complement sequence.

params.name: hubUrl
params.description: URL of the hub.txt file for a sequence hub.

items.docs: Retrieves a DNA sequence from a genome assembly for a specified genomic region.

params.description: Search query string.

params.description: Genome assembly identifier to search within.
